info.title: ninja
info.description: A tool for detecting dependencies of .NET projects.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --path
options.description: Path of the projects to be changed.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Preview changes without actually making them [default: False]

options.name: --allow-preview
options.description: Allow using preview versions of packages from Nuget. [default: False]

options.name: --nuget-server
options.description: If you want to use a customized nuget server instead of the official nuget.org, you can set it with a value like: https://nuget.myserver/v3/index.json

options.name: --token
options.description: The PAT token which has privilege to access the nuget server. See: https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/organizations/accounts/use-personal-access-tokens-to-authenticate

options.name: --allow-package-version-cross-microsoft-runtime
options.description: Allow using NuGet package versions for different Microsoft runtime versions. For example, when using runtime 6.0, it will avoid upgrading packages to 7.0. [default: False]

commands.name: all-officials
commands.description: The command to run all officially supported features.

commands.name: fill-properties
commands.description: The command to fill all missing properties for .csproj files.

commands.name: clean-dup
commands.description: The command to clean all duplicate properties for .csproj files.

commands.name: remove-deprecated
commands.description: The command to replace all deprecated packages to new packages.

commands.name: upgrade-pkg
commands.description: The command to upgrade all package references to possible latest and avoid conflicts.

commands.name: clean-pkg
commands.description: The command to clean up possible useless package references.

commands.name: clean-prj
commands.description: The command to clean up possible useless project references.

commands.name: visualize
commands.description: The command to visualize the dependency relationship, with mermaid markdown.

options.name: --excludes
options.description: Packages to exclude from the chart. Seperated by ','. For example: 'Microsoft,System,Test' to ignore system packages.

options.name: --local
options.description: Only show local project references. (Ignore package references.) [default: False]

commands.name: expect-files
commands.description: The command to search for all expected files and add patch the content.
